expectations.evidence: Line 11 subscribes to EpochSettled in the WebSocket subscribe message, and line 15 describes it as marking epoch settlement completion.
Line 11 includes RecipientAWPDistributed in the subscribe array, and lines 23-34 detail how these events are accumulated per epoch.
Line 11 includes DAOMatchDistributed in the subscribe array, and lines 36-45 describe handling this event to capture the DAO match amount.
Lines 55-56 describe sorting recipients by awpAmount descending and taking top 5. Lines 67-72 show the display format with ranked recipients sorted by amount.
Lines 81-100 describe polling GET /emission/current every 60 seconds as a fallback when WebSocket is unavailable.
Line 66 displays 'DAO match: 7,900,000.0000 AWP' in the alert format, derived from the DAOMatchDistributed event.
